reason_text: Single-shot plan-then-execute (harness plan_execute_v1) cannot reference server-assigned entity ids (evt1/ord1/tkt1) it never observes, flooring baseline success at 0.40 and masking the interface effect. This is a setup confound, not an agent outcome. Diagnosis: 4/10 single-call/id-free tasks pass; the 6 id-dependent tasks fail with 'not_found'. Replaced by the interactive harness p1_interactive_v1, where the model sees each tool result before the next call.
predefined_policy_reference: manual 11.1 (kill setup bugs in pilot before scaling); 14.5 (predefined exclusion of non-agent infra confounds)
